lines.ja: I was ready to do anything for you
lines.en: I was ready to do anything for you

lines.ja: Nothing changed I am(you are) blinded by
lines.en: Nothing changed — I am (you are) blinded by

lines.ja: greed and fallen down
lines.en: greed, and fallen down

lines.ja: 目を逸らした現実に 突きつけられた
lines.en: The reality I was looking away from was shoved right in my face

lines.ja: 「What is your desired fate in order?」
lines.en: "What is your desired fate in order?"

lines.ja: 掴んだ答えの果ては
lines.en: The answer I grasped, at the end of it all,

lines.ja: 余りにも朽ちて崩れてく
lines.en: was too decayed, falling apart

lines.ja: 偽りの居場所の跡さえも
lines.en: Even the traces of that false place I called home

lines.ja: （消えて）
lines.en: (disappear)

lines.ja: 満たされた筈の渇きを
lines.en: A thirst I thought I'd quenched —

lines.ja: 思い出すように貪った
lines.en: I devoured it like I was trying to remember

lines.ja: 焼き付けた君の影が
lines.en: The silhouette of you, burned into me,

lines.ja: 遠ざかった
lines.en: receded further away

lines.ja: この時の中で 泡沫に消えるなら
lines.en: If I'm going to vanish like foam within this moment,

lines.ja: 大切なモノなんて何も無くて
lines.en: then I have nothing precious left

lines.ja: I just wanna believe in you
lines.en: I just wanna believe in you

lines.ja: Nothing changes my love for you
lines.en: Nothing changes my love for you

lines.ja: But someday....
lines.en: But someday…

lines.ja: 求め続けるよ 僕が僕である意味を
lines.en: I'll keep searching — for the meaning of being me

lines.ja: 傷ついたこの手で 何を得た？
lines.en: With these wounded hands — what did I even gain?

lines.ja: Am I hearing this right?
lines.en: Am I hearing this right?

lines.ja: 「Trust me again!」
lines.en: "Trust me again!"

lines.ja: 誰かが言う真実が 引き裂いたのは
lines.en: What someone else's truth tore apart was —

lines.ja: 「Who are you talking to now?」
lines.en: "Who are you talking to now?"

lines.ja: 壊れた視界の中で
lines.en: Inside a broken field of vision,

lines.ja: いつかみた君を見つけても
lines.en: even if I find the you I once saw,

lines.ja: 呼びかけた声は聞こえなくて
lines.en: the voice I call out with never reaches

lines.ja: （Looking for...）
lines.en: (Looking for…)

lines.ja: 描いた理想のために
lines.en: For the sake of the ideal I drew,

lines.ja: 重ねた罪は離れないのに
lines.en: the sins I piled up refuse to let me go,

lines.ja: 記憶に残った君は
lines.en: yet the you I remember

lines.ja: 擦り抜けていく
lines.en: slips right through my fingers

lines.ja: この時を越えて 僕を呼ぶ声がした
lines.en: Beyond this moment, I heard a voice calling me

lines.ja: 名前さえ霞む姿でもまだ
lines.en: Even as a figure whose name is blurring out —

lines.ja: I still remember even now
lines.en: I still remember even now

lines.ja: But I cannot even touch you
lines.en: But I cannot even touch you

lines.ja: But someday...
lines.en: But someday…

lines.ja: 幻でも良い 確かに君を想うよ
lines.en: Even if it's an illusion — I'm truly thinking of you

lines.ja: 僕達の過去と存在が
lines.en: If our past and our existence

lines.ja: 全て作られた偽りなら
lines.en: are all fabricated lies,

lines.ja: 最初から僕の意味なんて無い？
lines.en: then from the start, was there any meaning to me?

lines.ja: （No, I'm not.）
lines.en: (No, I'm not.)

lines.ja: 刻んだ痛みも夢も
lines.en: The pain I carved in, the dreams too —

lines.ja: この胸に深く残してたんだ
lines.en: I was keeping them deep in my chest

lines.ja: 擦り切れた君の声が
lines.en: Your worn-out voice

lines.ja: 今届いた
lines.en: just reached me

lines.ja: この時の中で泡沫になる前に
lines.en: Before I dissolve into foam within this moment,

lines.ja: 大切なモノを守りたくて 僕は
lines.en: I want to protect what matters to me, so — I'll —

lines.ja: I am gonna believe in you
lines.en: I am gonna believe in you

lines.ja: Nothing changes my love for you
lines.en: Nothing changes my love for you

lines.ja: Because someday....
lines.en: Because someday…

lines.ja: その手をとるまで 何度でも呼ぶから
lines.en: I'll call for you as many times as it takes, until I can take your hand

lines.ja: 強く強く願いを込めて
lines.en: With a wish as fierce as I can make it

lines.ja: This is my final answer
lines.en: This is my final answer

lines.ja: No matter who says what,
lines.en: No matter who says what,

lines.ja: I find you anyway...
lines.en: I find you anyway…

lines.ja: 求め続けるよ 僕が僕であるために
lines.en: I'll keep searching — so I can keep being me
